400.description: Bad request (email/password policy, disposable email, duplicate email)

value.message: Password must be at least 12 characters long.
Disposable/temporary email addresses are not allowed.
An account with this email already exists.

400.description: Bad request (public email blocked, disposable email, duplicate email, invalid business name)

public_email_blocked.summary: Public email not allowed for business

value.message: Business accounts must use a company email domain (no public providers).
An account with this email already exists.

200.description: Business login success; token pair returned

400.description: Bad request (public email domain blocked for business login)

example.message: Business accounts must use a company email domain (no public providers).

value.message: No business membership found for this user.

example.message: Verification code sent. Check your inbox and spam folder.
This email is already verified. You can log in directly.
No account found with this email address.
Password reset code sent. Check your inbox and spam folder.
No account found with this email address.
Password must be at least 12 characters long.

401.description: Unauthorized (invalid/missing token or wrong current password)

example.message: Password must be at least 12 characters long.
